name: Bulgur Wheat & Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine mushrooms, zucchini, water, bulgur wheat, onion, green pepper, garlic, chicken bouillon granules, basil, celery seed, thyme or marjoram, and pepper.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer until all the liquid is absorbed, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 more minutes.
5. Fluff with a fork.
6. Serve 4 servings (3/4 cup each).
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
Source: Better Homes and Garden Diabetic Cookbook
